_readme: Digital Marketing Pro ships NO active hooks as of v3.1.0. Earlier versions registered SessionStart, PreToolUse Write/Edit, PreToolUse mcp_.*, and SessionEnd hooks that fired on EVERY Claude Code operation in EVERY project — not just DMP work — because Claude Code plugin hooks have no per-directory or per-project scoping. The PreToolUse mcp_.* matcher was particularly problematic: it intercepted EVERY MCP tool call from ANY plugin, gating all MCP writes through DMP's brand-compliance prompt regardless of context. Their work (dependency check, brand compliance, MCP write-operation guard, session-end insight saving) already lives at the right architectural layer: per-agent compliance instructions, manual `python3 scripts/setup.py` invocation when needed, and per-agent decision flows for MCP writes that already require explicit user approval. Prior config preserved at hooks/hooks-reference.example.json with rationale notes per hook. To re-enable a specific hook, copy its entry into the 'hooks' object below.
